body.body: Replace 29M-row corpus co-occurrence table with top-20 embedding-similarity edges per word. Schema: wg_edges(word_a, word_b, similarity REAL). Batch compute from nomic-embed-text after lemmatization. 1.6M rows, ~20MB. Requires Igor down for cutover. Depends on T-db-lemmatize.
body.title: Replace wg_cooccur with embedding-proximity edges
body.result: committed 5c1a0f7 — wg_cooccur replaced with embedding-proximity edges
